name: Brain Coral
desc: Slower-growing, dense corals that look like a human brain. They are very long-lived.

name: Staghorn Coral
desc: Branching coral that grows quickly but is highly sensitive to rising ocean temperatures.

name: Elkhorn Coral
desc: Named for its antler-like branches, these corals provide critical habitat for fish species.

name: Pillar Coral
desc: Tall, column-like structures that form unique vertical habitats in the reef ecosystem.
